meaning: adj.复仇心重的,(利于)报复的
examples: He is puzzled, rather than vengeful when other children snatch things from him or push him around.
The morning after that combat, Hugo got up with a heart filled with vengeful purposes against the King.
IF but some vengeful god would call to me.
It's harder still to find any grounding in contemporary life for the vengeful anarchists.
Playing opposite Nick Nolte and taking on a corrupt, vengeful character, Hoffman is poised to shine.
